revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-840

An electromagnetic wave whose electric field vector at all times lies in a fixed plane which contains the direction of propagation.

Reference: I.R.E.


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Plane polarized wave}}
